title: Masonry
description: Create new decorative blocks using the Stonecutter!
body:
# Masonry
By Team Metallurgy

![Masonry blocks overview](https://i.imgur.com/GVhyRaA.jpg)

Documentation forthcoming, construct a Stonecutter and insert any number of vanilla stone-like material blocks to carve them. 

Current Release: Beta

Please report any and all bugs on the Github.

Join our Discord for Masonry updates as well as other Team Metallurgy mod updates! [Discord Link](https://discord.com/invite/TuJXw7V)

**FAQ**

**Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack?**

**A: As long as the modpack is for private use or hosted on CurseForge you are more than welcome to include Masonry!  
  
**

**Q: Can I reuse this mods art assets?  
A: Do not re-use our artwork elsewhere.**

**Q: Can I use this mod in my video or review it for my channel?  
A: Yes! We highly encourage you to show off the mod and feel free to post the link in the comments when you finish it!**

**Q: Is <Material> going to be added?**  
**A: All vanilla materials are possible candidates for future updates. If its another mod's materials we're less likely to introduce it but that doesn't mean its** completely **off the table.**
